title: Fix invalid CSS margin 'auto' in ConnectionScreen
Fix EventBus attribute error and add hardening
description: Fixes the systemic AttributeError by using module-level Event class instead of event_bus.Event attribute. Adds smoke tests and pre-commit guard as per plan/bug/2026-04-30-event-bus-event-attribute-error.md.
close_reason: Implemented systemic fix for EventBus attribute error, added integration smoke tests, and established pre-commit guard against the incorrect pattern.

title: Debug dry-run error untuk table area_publik
description: Jalankan dry-run pada mapping area_publik, identifikasi error pada tahap extraction/transformation, lalu hasilkan bug report di plan/bug/
notes: Bug report disimpan di plan/bug/2026-04-30-event-bus-event-attribute-error.md. Root cause: panggilan event_bus.Event(...) di 30+ titik (dry_run.py, etl_pipeline.py, introspection.py) padahal Event adalah kelas modul, bukan atribut singleton. Dry-run untuk area_publik PASS setelah cacat dijinakkan eksperimental.

title: Pembuatan State Machine & Fitur Navigasi Back CLI
description: Tambahkan navigasi mundur bertahap berbasis stack pada semua layar TUI kecuali Menu Utama, dengan retensi data input. Spec: plan/feature/2026-04-29-cli-back-navigation-state-machine.md
close_reason: Implemented State Machine & Back Navigation with state retention and 'B' key support.

title: Plan: Automated HTML Reporting Engine
description: Buat issue ticket konseptual (Bahasa Indonesia, NO source code) di plan/feature/ untuk modul HTML Reporting Engine yang merangkum hasil Sync Sukses, Sync Gagal, atau Dry Run ke file HTML standalone.
close_reason: Issue ticket plan/feature/2026-04-29-automated-html-reporting-engine.md ditulis dalam Bahasa Indonesia, high-level, tanpa source code. /reports/ ditambahkan ke .gitignore.

title: Tulis issue tickets fitur Dry Run & Validation Mode
description: Terjemahkan pembaruan PRD Dry Run/Error Reporting (lihat plan/03-add-fitur-dry-run.md) menjadi issue ticket Markdown di plan/claude/. Tambahkan tiket dedicated untuk dry-run engine + error reporting solutif. Jangan tulis source code; bahasa Indonesia, beginner-friendly.
close_reason: Dua tiket Dry Run dibuat: plan/claude/11-dry-run-validation-engine.md (engine + error reporting solutif) dan plan/claude/12-tui-dry-run-screen.md (TUI integration). Tidak menyentuh tiket 01-10 yang sudah ada.

title: Optional YAML Connection Configuration with Fallback Input Interaktif
Fix invalid CSS border properties in TUI App
close_reason: Fixed invalid 'thin' and 'sunken' border properties in src/sync_mail/tui/app.py. Added smoke test in tests/smoke_tui.py.

title: Hardening, Documentation & Pre-Flight Checklist
description: Finalize documentation, pin dependencies, and expand test suite for production readiness.

title: Multi-Table Orchestration
description: Enable batch migration of entire schemas with dependency resolution.

title: TUI (Textual) Frontend
description: Build an interactive terminal UI for sync-mail using Textual.

title: Implement Checkpoint / State Management mechanism
description: Provide atomic migration state storage in state/<job_name>.state.json using write-temp + os.replace pattern to prevent corruption during crashes.

title: Redo: Mapping Loader & Validator
description: Re-implementing the mapping loader and validator for YAML configurations.

title: Redo: Schema Introspection & Auto-Generate YAML
description: Re-implementing the schema introspection and YAML mapping generation.

title: Redo: Database Connection Manager
description: Re-implementing the database connection module with SSDictCursor and low-memory focus.

title: Redo: Setup Proyek, Dependency & Pondasi Observability
description: Re-implementing the foundational setup including project structure, dependencies, logging, exceptions, and event bus.

title: Implement Database Connection Manager
description: Establish low-memory MariaDB connections using SSDictCursor and session-level query log disabling.

value: Pola publikasi event yang benar: gunakan kelas Event tingkat modul sebagai konstruktor (Event(...)), bukan via atribut singleton (event_bus.Event(...)). Selalu impor Event, EventType, dan event_bus dari sync_mail.observability.
